basic_details.job_title: SVPUAT Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 126 Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, Professor Posts

For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

Associate Professor: No upper age limit is specified. Professor: No upper age limit is specified. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

content_sections.heading: SVPUAT Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology (SVPUAT) Recruitment 2026 notification released for 126 posts of Teaching. Candidates with Master Degree, M.Phil/Ph.D Can Apply Online. The Online application process for SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 has started on 03-07-2026 and will remain open until 03-08-2026. The candidate shall apply online through SVPUAT website, https://www.svpuat.edu.in.

content_sections.heading: SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The SVPUAT Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 03-07-2026 at https://www.svpuat.edu.in. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. SVPUAT Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : SVPUAT Teaching Online Form 2026 Post Date : 06-07-2026 Total Vacancy : 126 Posts Brief Information: The Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology (SVPUAT) has announced a notification for the recruitment of Teaching Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

content_sections.heading: SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 Notification Overview
content_sections.text: The Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology (SVPUAT) has officially released a recruitment notification for Teaching. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

rows.sardar_vallabhbhai_patel_university_of_a: Application Fee All Candidates: Rs. 1500/- For SC/ST/Persons with disability (PWD): Rs. 750/-
SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Starting Date for Apply Online: 03-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 03-08-2026

SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 Age Limit Assistant Professor: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable for OBC (05 years), SC/ST (05 years), PWD (15 years), and Regular Employees of State of UP (05 years). Associate Professor: No upper age limit is specified. Professor: No upper age limit is specified. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

Eligibility Criteria Professor (Sr.No.A1, A2, B1 and E1): Ph.D. degree in the concerned/relevant discipline and published work of high quality, actively engaged in research with evidence of publication work with, a minimum of 10 research publications in the peer-reviewed, NAAS rated or UGC-listed journal and a total API score of 120. Minimum of ten years of teaching experience in university/college as Assistant Professor*/Associate Professor and/or research experience at equivalent level at the University/National Level Institutions with evidence of having successfully guided doctoral candidate. Professor (S.No. F1 to F5): A recognized basic veterinary qualification included in the schedules I/II of Indian Veterinary Council Act; 1984 & must be registered with a State Veterinary Council/Veterinary Council of India. An eminent scholar having a Ph.D. degree in the concerned/relevant discipline and published work of high quality, actively engaged in research with evidence of publication work with, a minimum of 10 research publications in the peer-reviewed, NAAS rated or UGC-listed journal and a total API score of 120. A minimum of ten years of teaching experience in university/college as Assistant Professor*/Associate Professor and/or research experience at equivalent level at the University/National Level Institutions with evidence of having successfully guided doctoral candidate. Associate Professor (Sr. No. A3, B2, B3 and D1): A good academic record, with a Ph.D. Degree in the concerned/allied/relevant disciplines. A Master's Degree with at least 55% marks. A minimum of eight years of experience of teaching and/or research in an academic/research position equivalent to that of Assistant Professor in a University, College or Accredited Research Institution/industry with a minimum of seven publications in the peer-reviewed, NAAS rated or UGC-listed journals and a total research score of Seventy five (75). Associate Professor (Sr. No. C1): Ph.D. degree in relevant field and First class or equivalent at either Bachelor's or Master's Level in the relevant branch. At least total 6 research publications in SCI journals/UGC/AICTE approved list of journals. Minimum of 8 years of experience in teaching/research/industry out of which at least 2 years shall be Post Ph.D. experience and a total research score of Seventy-five (75). Assistant Professor (Sr. No. F6): A recognized basic veterinary qualification included in the schedules I/II of Indian Veterinary Council Act; 1984 & must be registered with a State Veterinary Council/Veterinary Council of India. NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016 and their amendments from time to time. Professor (Veterinary Parasitology): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Veterinary Parasitology with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications and API score 120 or outstanding professional criteria. Professor (Veterinary Public Health & Epidemiology): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Veterinary Public Health & Epidemiology with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications and API score 120 or outstanding professional criteria. Professor (Animal Nutrition): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Animal Nutrition with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications and API score 120 or outstanding professional criteria. Professor (Livestock Products Technology): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Livestock Products Technology with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications and API score 120 or outstanding professional criteria. Professor (Veterinary Animal Husbandry & Extension Education): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Animal Husbandry & Extension Education with 10 years teaching/research experience, 10 publications and API score 120 or outstanding professional criteria. Associate Professor (Veterinary Anatomy): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in relevant discipline, Master's with 55% marks, 8 years experience and 7 publications with research score 75. Associate Professor (Livestock Products Technology): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Livestock Products Technology, Master's with 55% marks, 8 years experience and 7 publications with research score 75. Associate Professor (Veterinary Gynaecology & Obstetrics): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Veterinary Gynaecology & Obstetrics, Master's with 55% marks, 8 years experience and 7 publications with research score 75. Associate Professor (Veterinary Medicine): Recognized basic veterinary qualification registered with State Veterinary Council/VCI; Ph.D. in Veterinary Medicine, Master's with 55% marks, 8 years experience and 7 publications with research score 75.

Salary Professor : At academic level 14 with rationalized entry pay of Rs. 1,44,200/- Associate Professor : At academic level 13A with rationalized entry pay of Rs. 1,31,400/- Assistant Professor : At academic level 10 with rationalized entry pay of Rs. 57,700/-
Associate Professor (Natural Resource Management- Soil Science & Agricultural Chemistry)
Associate Professor (Food Safety and Quality Assurance)
Assistant Professor Veterinary Biochemistry & Physiology - Veterinary Biochemistry
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online

content_sections.heading: SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 03-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 03-08-2026

content_sections.heading: SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Relaxation in upper age limit is applicable for OBC (05 years), SC/ST (05 years), PWD (15 years), and Regular Employees of State of UP (05 years). Associate Professor: No upper age limit is specified. Professor: No upper age limit is specified. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is SVPUAT Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel University of Agriculture and Technology for 126 Teaching posts including Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor positions.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SVPUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 126 vacancies are announced.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for SVPUAT Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official website of SVPUAT.

faq.question: Q4. What is the starting date to apply online?
faq.answer: The online application starts from 03 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for SVPUAT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 03 August 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s Degree, M.Phil, or Ph.D depending on the post, along with required teaching/research experience for higher posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee?
faq.answer: ₹1500 for General/OBC and ₹750 for SC/ST/PWD candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: Assistant Professor salary is Level 10 with a pay scale of ₹57,700/- per month.
